appmesh.virtualnode.listenertls.Certific.Description: A reference to an object that represents a listener's Transport Layer Security (TLS) certificate.

appmesh.virtualnode.listenertls.Mode.Description: Specify one of the following modes.  + ****STRICT – Listener only accepts connections with TLS enabled. + ****PERMISSIVE – Listener accepts connections with or without TLS enabled.+ ****DISABLED – Listener only accepts connections without TLS.

appmesh.virtualnode.listenertls.Validati.Description: A reference to an object that represents a listener's Transport Layer Security (TLS) validation context.
